datasets.hash_material: canonical JSON of loader name, data shape, target shape, feature names, rounded float data, and target values
datasets.notes: Small frozen public tabular regression task used for runner plumbing and baseline policy validation; not a broad tabular benchmark by itself.

datasets.source: scikit-learn fetched California housing regression dataset
datasets.source_identity: sklearn.datasets.fetch_california_housing from scikit-learn 1.9.0, deterministic 5,000-row sample with benchmark seed 42
datasets.hash_material: scripts/run_model_benchmark_suite.py workload_fingerprint over workload name, source string, sampled features, and sampled target values
datasets.notes: Bounded public tabular regression workload used in maintained model-suite evidence; raw source has 20,640 rows and the benchmark fixes the deterministic sample by seed.
